examples: Alcohol acts as a diuretic, making you even more dehydrated.
Many remedies effective in joint disease are primarily diuretic.
Spironolactone (Aldactone) is a diuretic that can help ease some of the symptoms of PMS.
Also, people on the diuretic had fewer fatal strokes than those who had been taking the ACE inhibitor.
Garzelli, winner of the 2001 race, was suspended in 2002 after testing positive for the banned diuretic probenecid.
